title: Career Services | Duke Kunshan University
text:
Welcome to the Office of Career Services Site from Duke Kunshan University
The Office of Career Services is dedicated to providing career development services to all students and alumni (including 1-1 career coaching, career workshops, company info sessions, corporate visits, etc.), helping them discover and achieve their career goals.
For More Information Click here: Career Services Office Brochure
